title: Building liberal compute
subtitle: American AI companies won’t move to Europe. But we can work to have them deploy compute on liberal shores.

title: Let Europeans use AI
subtitle: AI progress is fast. This makes the EU’s high-risk AI rules unworkable.

title: Why is Switzerland so rich?
subtitle: Thoughts on a prosperous and well-run nation

title: Germany’s slow move toward supply-side reform
subtitle: High energy prices, a skilled labor shortage, and bureaucratic hurdles stand in the way of economic growth. If holdouts can be convinced, the response may resemble American supply-side liberalism.

title: Talent sorting in Germany is flawed
subtitle: Medical school is great, but shouldn't be the default for high-achieving kids
